name: Mission Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured community bank offering business accounts, SBA lending, commercial loans, and 1031 exchange facilitation services.
description_long: Mission Bank is a locally-based bank headquartered in Bakersfield, California, with multiple office locations throughout the state. The bank positions itself as a community-focused institution emphasizing personalized service and local relationships for business customers. Mission Bank offers a comprehensive suite of banking services including business checking and savings accounts, digital banking, online banking platforms with treasury management services, and remote deposit capture for business customers. The bank specializes in lending products including SBA loans for small business financing, commercial project financing, and agricultural loans, alongside standard banking services. Mission Bank distinguishes itself through its locally-based operation and emphasis on relationship banking, with dedicated banker connections and willingness to consult with customers' attorneys and financial advisors. The bank also operates Mission 1031 Exchange, LLC, a wholly-owned subsidiary serving as a nationwide qualified intermediary for Section 1031 tax-deferred property exchanges, maintaining FDIC-insured segregated accounts and FEA membership. For consumers seeking business banking or investment property exchange services, Mission Bank provides FDIC insurance protection and traditional bank safety features. However, the bank's website content focuses predominantly on business services rather than consumer retail banking, suggesting this is primarily a business-oriented institution rather than a general consumer bank. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Online banking platform with login access
Remote Deposit Capture for business customers
SBA loans and small business lending
In-person banking at multiple California locations
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Specializes in SBA loans and small business lending with dedicated banker support
Operates Mission 1031 Exchange subsidiary as nationwide qualified intermediary with FEA membership
1031 Exchange deposits held in segregated FDIC-insured accounts with monthly statements and transaction accounting
Offers agricultural loans as specialized lending product
Multiple office locations throughout California providing in-person access
Treasury Management Services and Remote Deposit Capture for business efficiency
cons: Website content suggests primarily business-focused services with limited consumer retail banking information
No mention of consumer checking/savings account features, interest rates, or minimum balance requirements
1031 Exchange service requires phone contact for consultation rather than transparent online pricing
Limited information about personal lending, credit cards, or other consumer products beyond brief MyCardStatement reference
Requires customers to contact bank directly for most services rather than providing self-service details online
best_for: Small business owners seeking SBA loans and commercial financing
Real estate investors conducting 1031 tax-deferred property exchanges
Agricultural businesses and farms requiring specialized ag lending
Commercial enterprises needing treasury management and business banking services
diagnosis: Mission Bank is best for small business owners, agricultural enterprises, and real estate investors seeking relationship-based banking with specialized lending products and 1031 exchange services. The main caveat is that this is a business-focused bank with limited publicly available information about consumer retail banking services, making it less suitable for individual consumers seeking basic checking/savings accounts without business banking needs.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
